testcase.name: returns503ForBetaFailure

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. testcase.name: returns503ForHistoricalPriceFailure

testcase.name: returns400ForInvalidYears
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-21T19:33:03.070-04:00 DEBUG 40276 --- [mutual-fund-calculator-backend] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.group13.mutualfundcalculatorbackend.controller.CalculationController#calculateFutureValue(String, BigDecimal, Integer) 2026-03-21T19:33:03.090-04:00 DEBUG 40276 --- [mutual-fund-calculator-backend] [ main] o.s.web.method.HandlerMethod : Could not resolve parameter [2] in public com.group13.mutualfundcalculatorbackend.dto.FutureValueResponse com.group13.mutualfundcalculatorbackend.controller.CalculationController.calculateFutureValue(java.lang.String,java.math.BigDecimal,java.lang.Integer): Method parameter 'years': Failed to convert value of type 'java.lang.String' to required type 'java.lang.Integer'; For input string: "abc" 2026-03-21T19:33:03.090-04:00 DEBUG 40276 --- [mutual-fund-calculator-backend] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Using @ExceptionHandler com.group13.mutualfundcalculatorbackend.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler#handleRequestBindingExceptions(Exception, HttpServletRequest) 2026-03-21T19:33:03.090-04:00 DEBUG 40276 --- [mutual-fund-calculator-backend] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json] 2026-03-21T19:33:03.090-04:00 DEBUG 40276 --- [mutual-fund-calculator-backend] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [ErrorResponse[timestamp=2026-03-21T23:33:03.090093500Z, status=400, error=Bad Request, message=Reque (truncated)...] 2026-03-21T19:33:03.090-04:00 DEBUG 40276 --- [mutual-fund-calculator-backend] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.method.annotation.MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException: Method parameter 'years': Failed to convert value of type 'java.lang.String' to required type 'java.lang.Integer'; For input string: "abc"]
